_meta.purpose: Taylor Dasch voice rubric — consumed by ~/.hermes/scripts/voice-check.py. Edit freely; script reloads at each run.
_meta.source: CLAUDE.md communication + content rules + memory feedback notes

voice: Data-first. Lead with numbers, not narratives. Specific beats generic.
Honest. Include real negatives (foundation, noise, drainage, traffic) when they exist — that builds trust.
Short. No disclaimers, no reverse-confirmations, no hedging, no fluff.
Analyst not salesperson. Taylor has $27M+ in transactions — sounds like an investor-analyst, not an order-taker.
One creative/unexpected element per piece (a data angle, a contrarian take, a surprising comparison, a niche hook). Playing it safe is the mistake.
Email voice: lead with attachment or data, one insight, easy CTA.
No generic RE language — never 'dream home', 'perfect neighborhood', 'nestled', 'premier', 'coveted', 'charming'.
broker_rule: Taylor is a real estate AGENT, never a broker. Never call him a broker in any content.

tiktok.required: filmed native for TikTok, not clipped from YouTube

temple_insider.never: investor ROI content — that lives in Investor Brief

linkedin.audience: professional relocators, BSW referral partners (via Matt Levant lender channel), out-of-state agents for referrals
linkedin.never: generic RE agent posts ('Just Listed!' without data)

gmb.required: real data (MLS, market stats), local keywords

email.rules: Lead with attachment/data. One insight. Easy CTA. No fluff.

ads_rule: Ad spend = BSW medical (#1) + military (#2) ONLY. Never create investor ads.
bsw_rule: BSW outreach ONLY via lender channel (Matt Levant, Acre Mortgage). Stark Law blocks direct gatekeeper outreach (Peggy Peters + all BSW-employed staff).
numerical: Use real MLS data, never estimates or vibes
Use Node for calculations, never LLM math
If you're about to use a number you can't cite, remove it
Cap rates, DSCR, rate ranges — always cite source (MLS, Acre Mortgage quote, DSCR lender sheet)
first_of_month_rule: 1st of every month = dedicated expired listings block. Do not schedule competing content.
heagerty_rule: Heagerty Partners is a real estate CLIENT, never mixed with AI side income work.
